    Index

    A C D F G I L M R S T 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    G

    generateHashIndex(String) - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Generates the hash index of a given word by using Java's hashCode() method and using the modulus operator.
    GenericLinkedList<T> - Class in dictionary
    A generic doubly linked list implementation with forward and backward traversal using a ListIterator.
    GenericLinkedList() - Constructor for class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Constructor for the class, empty with no elements.
    get(int) - Method in class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Returns the element at a certain index.
    getAllWords() - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Creates a sorted ArrayList of all the words in the dictionary by iterating through each bucket in the hash table, and adding it to the ArrayList.
    getCount(T) - Method in class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Gets the count data field of the element passed by traversing and comparing using the equals' method.
    getFirst() - Method in class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Returns first element in list (head).
    getFrequency(String) - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the frequency of the word parameter by generating the hash index and checking if word appears in bucket.
    getLast() - Method in class dictionary.GenericLinkedList
    Returns the last element in the list (tail).
    getLoadFactor() - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Estimates the load factor of the hash table by dividing the amount of unique words by the hash table size.
    getTotalWords() - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the total number of words by traversing the sorted ArrayList of all the words and adding up the frequency of each element.
    getUniqueWords() - Method in class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the amount of unique words by taking the size of the sorted words by calling size method on getAllWords method.
    GUIDriver - Class in driver
     
    GUIDriver(String) - Constructor for class driver.GUIDriver
